name: okta_org2org_creation_modification
description: An Okta Org2Org app was created or modified (application.lifecycle.{update,create,activate} with an 'Org2Org' target).

validation.notes: Base eventTypes are present (application.lifecycle.update=177, create=14, activate=1 over 90d); the Org2Org-target subset was not separately counted and is expected to be rare. Org2Org apps are a known persistence/lateral-movement vector. The 'Org2Org in target displayName' test is reproduced with a calculated field doing CONTAINS across the low-index target display names (positional flattening). Panther severity = HIGH on create, else MEDIUM.
